system.description:
You can push yourself to do one of the following:

  • Unleash an enormous blast of magical force,
  • Call down a natural or unnatural storm around you (gale-force winds, whirling sunfire, gravitic vortices, etc.)

You can’t be harmed by your own Charmbreak.
When you push yourself to use this ability, you still gain the benefits of pushing yourself (+1d, +1 impact, etc.) if you’re making a roll.
